note: Pinned to a commit SHA, not 'main' branch, since upstream has no tags/releases. Upstream's own onnx/manifest.json ships with empty sha256/bytes placeholders, so these values were independently verified: model.onnx's oid/size come straight from its Git LFS pointer at this commit; config.json's sha256 was computed after fetching it at this commit (it is not LFS-tracked).
